channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse says Clarity better than chaos as Senate hits key moment
item.description: The crypto market structure Clarity Act needs to get to its next step, a Senate hearing, this month to have a reasonable chance, Garlinghouse said.

item.title: US Government Will Vet Pre-Release AI Models From Google, xAI and Microsoft
item.description: Google, Microsoft, and Elon Musk’s xAI have agreed to run their models by the U.S. government as Trump weighs an AI executive order.

item.title: Solana Foundation Launches Pay.sh in Collaboration with Google Cloud
item.description: Solana Foundation In collaboration with Google Cloud introduced Pay.sh, a gateway service designed to bridge the gap between autonomous agents and enterprise infrastructure.

item.title: Wall Street warns human-built markets can’t keep up with machine-speed trading
item.description: Legacy financial systems face pressure as tokenization and real-time trading push markets toward always-on, automated infrastructure, panelists at Consensus in Miami said on Tuesday.

item.title: Crypto's value is from being outside regulatory apparatus, says Arthur Hayes
item.description: All that matters for bitcoin’s value proposition is fiat liquidity, said Arthur Hayes, CIO of Maelstrom, at Consensus Miami 2026.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw Investment Surge After Brief Lull Threatens Winning Streak
item.description: Bitcoin funds are flying high again after a short-lived stretch of outflows nearly wrecked their recent run of green weeks.

item.title: From bitcoin mining to the Hill: AIP’s new fellow brings hands-on crypto experience to D.C.
item.description: Jacob Smagula previously worked on the government affairs team at bitcoin mining company MARA and is currently on the policy team at the DeFi Education Fund.

item.title: Jito Labs launches self-custody trading tool as activity heats up on Solana
item.description: JTX is the company’s first product built specifically for traders. It allows users to trade tokens on Solana while maintaining self-custody.

item.title: Keyed nonces are not just a way to add stronger in-protocol support for privacy solutions. They are also a potential first foray into a new state scaling strategy for Ethereum: create new types of storage that are more optimized for handling categories of use case - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBodHJZNnJ0QmdtNkJfa2JCaldNaC1sX2xpZERRUG5abkd6aEtaX0NyTktjREx3RlNZVWF2VXFUMUpXd3E1UGlhQzljT0YzcmJud3JZTUdkYkVEekwyNUpVUl92cmhTZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Keyed nonces are not just a …

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Coinbase taps Centrifuge as preferred tokenization backbone, takes equity stake
item.description: The partnership includes a strategic investment by Coinbase and is focused on expanding tokenized ETFs, credit, and structured products.

item.title: Kaiko flags possible front-running before Robinhood token listings
item.description: Kaiko said open interest, funding rates and wallet activity showed repeated pre-announcement positioning before several Robinhood token listings.

item.title: Andreessen Horowitz Raises $2.2 Billion to Fund Next Wave of Crypto Startups
item.description: Andreessen Horowitz's latest fund signals institutional confidence in crypto as the investment landscape shows signs of recovery.

item.title: Space and Time rolls out virtual vaults for institutional onchain lending
item.description: The data blockchain securing onchain finance projects looks to provide lenders and borrowers with agreement-specific collateral solution.

item.title: Binance changes weekend pricing for commodity TradFi futures
item.description: Binance will shift to an orderbook-weighted pricing model for commodity perpetual futures during off-hours, potentially changing margin and liquidation behavior.

item.title: Crypto.com’s high-rolling head of marketing to leave after almost six years
item.description: Steven Kalifowitz will be moving on from his role as CMO, effective June 30, and will then continue on as advisor to the CEO.

item.title: 🇺🇸 HAYES: Regulation has no impact on crypto’s utility. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8wWlh2NTFDaWx5LVJCV3Z5al95dGRQMXhRRUZ4XzBDekZzSmZPZVhyU2c0R2NfV0Q5WkFlX0dybHhmRE1Iem5oWE9PSEhsa2xjYmxIamQ4dkx5TjhYOWtKTldzSjM?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 HAYES: Regulation has no i…

item.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of workforce, citing market slump and AI shift
item.description: Brian Armstrong said Coinbase will flatten management layers and require leaders to work as “player-coaches” under the new structure.

item.title: Bitcoin ‘supercycle’ or bear-market rally? BTC breaking $81K has traders at odds
item.description: Bitcoin bottom calls grow as analysts target $180,000–$250,000 within a year, fueling debate over whether BTC has resumed its broader bull cycle.

item.title: Consensus Miami Day 1: Real-time coverage and highlights from on the ground
item.description: Consensus Miami 2026 launched on Tuesday. Stay tuned for updates throughout the day.

item.title: Crypto products post 5th straight week of inflows despite mid-week selloff
item.description: Crypto ETPs shed $619 million over four days before a $737 million Friday session rescued the week, extending the inflow streak to $4.02 billion across five weeks.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index jumps 1.3% as all constituents trade higher
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP) rose 5.2% and Chainlink (LINK) gained 4% since Monday.

item.title: State Street and Galaxy launch tokenized fund to bring cash management onchain
item.description: The fund lets institutions earn yield on stablecoins while moving cash onchain with round-the-clock access.

item.title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
item.description: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.

item.title: K Wave Media scraps massive bitcoin treasury plan to redirect $485 million to AI
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed firm raised $500 million to invest in bitcoin. Less than a year later, it is chasing the market's current hot sector of AI.

item.title: Bitcoin absorbed $200 million profit-taking at $80,000 in a bullish sign for BTC
item.description: Net realized profits hit a one-month high of $207.56 million Sunday as bitcoin crossed $80,000 for the first time since January, with the price holding above the breakout level into Tuesday despite the heavy sell-side flow.

item.title: Bullish to buy transfer agent Equiniti for $4.2B in tokenization push
item.description: Bullish has agreed to acquire transfer agent Equiniti as more Wall Street participants accelerate their tokenization initiatives to offer 24/7 trading.

item.title: Bitcoin's $81K Rally Comes Amid 66-Day Negative Funding Streak: Here’s Why
item.description: Shorts have paid a 12% annualized carry for 66 days amid Bitcoin's climb—analysts say the driver is institutional hedging, not fear.

item.title: Dutch users still access prediction markets despite Polymarket ban
item.description: Polymarket was banned in the Netherlands in February, but Kalshi, Hyperliquid and Interactive Brokers are still offering prediction markets to Dutch users.

item.title: Coinbase Cuts 14% of Staff Amid Crypto 'Down Market,' AI Adoption: CEO
item.description: The crypto exchange is restructuring around artificial intelligence and flattening its org chart, CEO Brian Armstrong said.

item.title: We've raised $2.2B in committed capital to invest in the next generation of crypto. Announcing Crypto Fund 5 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE96MFdLRUdqWE9henhMdjR1dEp6bWpLVllvSnZCbl9PVzdnaGQ2WmhTTDBCLUcxekk1MFlmY0wzZXVNVEh0TnVEcDFqOFh3eW53RUJyaW1JMll5em9zSUw3bg?oc=5" target="_blank">We've raised $2.2B in committed capi…

item.title: Standard Chartered expands further into crypto with stake in GSR at $1 billion valuation
item.description: SC Ventures, Standard Chartered’s venture capital division takes a stake in crypto trading firm GSR at a valuation of more than $1 billion, according to Bloomberg.

item.title: Andreessen Horowitz raises $2.2 billion in a new fund, saying crypto fundamentals are at an 'all-time high'
item.description: The new fund arrives as firms like Haun Ventures raise $1 billion and VC firms adapt to an AI-driven shift in capital.

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto VC Haun Raises $1B Despite Market Slump
item.description: Bitcoin is firmly over $80k. The DTCC is about to tokenize everything. And World Liberty Fi countersues Justin Sun.

item.title: Toncoin surges 36% as Telegram replaces TON Foundation and slashes fees
item.description: The market is repricing TON as a Telegram-led ecosystem again, not just a foundation-run chain with a messaging app narrative attached.

item.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of staff as AI reshapes how crypto companies operate
item.description: Brian Armstrong, the CEO at Coinbase, announced a workforce reduction of roughly 660 from its current 4,700.

item.title: TON Surges 36% as Telegram ‘Replaces’ TON Foundation
item.description: Toncoin has jumped on Pavel Durov's pledge to slash fees to near-zero, with TON meme coins piling on gains of up to 150%.

item.title: One bank after another scraps Fed rate-cut forecasts. Bitcoin doesn't care.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 5, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin taps $81K as long-term holders add 330K BTC: How high can price go?
item.description: Accumulation by long-term Bitcoin holders, buying by institutional investors and a strengthening technical structure could fuel BTC’s price rise to $95,000 or higher.

item.title: Ripple to Share North Korean Threat Intelligence With Crypto Industry
item.description: The move follows two nine-figure exploits of DeFi protocols Drift and KelpDAO in April, as DPRK hackers shift to social engineering tactics.

item.title: This is an email I sent earlier today to all employees at Coinbase: Team, Today I’ve made the difficult decision to reduce the size of Coinbase by ~14%. I want to walk you through why we're doing this now, what it means for those affected, and how this position - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9XQWtIVUcwUVI2elJraTJwVk1QWjY3T1JiTzRHZlFmZ3BYem5qZkJfeHdXVXlXODlXNGhYZ3pidVhsWThzYklGQmJGeGRHV2dpS2tDVGpGSmh6NzdaUVpOMUZld0FLNzg?oc=5" target="_blank">This is an email I sent ear…

item.title: UAE free zone launches blockchain-based business IDs for registered firms
item.description: Innovation City launches a blockchain-based business ID system, giving more than 1,000 firms verifiable onchain credentials for identity and access.

item.title: Telegram to become TON’s largest validator, Durov says
item.description: Toncoin rose 33.8% after Pavel Durov said Telegram would deepen its role in TON, while details on the foundation and validator structure remain unclear.

item.title: Bullish to Acquire Equiniti in $4.2B Deal, Expanding Into Tokenized Securities Bullish has agreed to acquire Equiniti, a global transfer agent, for approximately $4.2 billion including debt, according to the Wall Street Journal. Following the deal, the companies p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5LYWVnMHZlZFBJa3RwRWg5U1dlVXVpRnRocUF1aWcwcnhsdUp1UHdVTXl2dEp2X0dXd1VhX29vTHJORmFBMWJBMjhqTXFCOUFMRE5RM2dLdXgzcGV0VDgwS28yUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bullish to Acquire Equiniti in $…

item.title: Crypto platform Bullish to buy Equiniti for $4.2 billion, building tokenized securities infrastructure
item.description: The deal brings a regulated transfer agent into the Bullish stack, expanding the firm's end-to-end tokenization capabilities.

item.title: Bitcoin tops $80,000 as altcoins rally and risk appetite returns
item.description: Crypto markets climb Tuesday with BTC above $80,000, altcoins gaining momentum, and investors rotating into higher-risk plays amid improving sentiment.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs pull in $532M as BTC reclaims $80K amid ‘post-ceasefire recovery’
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs pulled in over $532 million on Monday as BTC surged past $80,000 amid improved risk sentiment following the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: DeFi lender Aave asks court to block $71 million crypto seizure tied to North Korea claims
item.description: The filing challenges a New York restraining notice that froze ETH on Arbitrum after the rsETH exploit, with Aave arguing the funds belong to users, not North Korea judgment creditors

item.title: Stablecoin proposal still ‘falls short’ of protecting bank deposits: US banks
item.description: US Senator Thom Tillis said the current text of the CLARITY Act offers a compromise for the crypto industry and banks and provides a bipartisan path for the bill’s passage.

item.title: Haun Ventures raises $1B, adding AI to crypto focus
item.description: Haun Ventures founder Katie Haun said AI will “increasingly begin to conduct economic activity on our behalf," and services will need to adapt for that world.

item.title: Polygon rolls out private stablecoin payments targeting institutions
item.description: The new wallet feature hides senders, receivers and amounts onchain while maintaining compliance through know your transaction screening and auditable files.

item.title: Russia's Largest Securities Exchange to Launch SOL, XRP, TRX and BNB Crypto Indexes The Moscow Exchange will begin publishing four crypto indexes tracking SOL, XRP, TRX and BNB from May 13, using pricing data from Binance (50%), Bybit (20%), OK - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5WSWZHY0tyalROM2YzRjMtQmsyME5rRHdlNlhraU1Cc1FyU3pNOHB6OXBEZW95WU5BWERIb0FGQXpKa05EZFpnQmZlSXh4Y182R1FaUGpKSmNIbldxb3ctT1lLdw?oc=5" target="_blank">Russia's Largest Securities Exch…

item.title: Is Bitcoin heading to $100,000? $BTC continues to show structural strength. Following a bullish MACD crossover on the weekly chart on April 13, we have already seen a steady 15% price increase. Historically, this specific weekly crossover has been a premie - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBIMWc0WUE5ajBhR19WOG85WjZORkppUlNZVk94RTlRWURCYUt5WWhoZHVKZFZHTkg1VFVwRXlPWFJ0R3N6aVJXTDBieG11R2ZoTjZCOUZwekI4ZEd6MVZV?oc=5" target="_blank">Is Bitcoin heading to $100,000? $BTC c…

item.title: Aave files emergency motion to lift restraining notice on frozen ETH
item.description: Aave argued that a thief doesn’t gain lawful ownership of property by stealing it and that Gerstein Harrow’s legal argument “defies logic, common sense and the law.”

item.title: 🚨TODAY: CRYPTO STOCKS SURGE AS CLARITY ACT MOMENTUM BUILDS Circle jumped nearly 20% on Monday, leading a broad rally in crypto-related equities as progress on the Clarity Act revived optimism around U.S. digital asset regulation. Coinbase - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBKY1liRXpZeEd4b3JkSVlPTlA2Tkt6eEs3eENoNnFVM2tvd0RwOEhKYmF4V0R1ZGF0anJZV0NFclJYdFFvdzFIT2I1SHU4eDE1UVp4REdHQ0NRekZmd0d3Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨TODAY: CRYPTO STOCKS SURGE AS CLAR…

item.title: Western Union begins USDPT stablecoin rollout on Solana
item.description: Western Union is one of several remittance companies that announced stablecoin plans after the US passed the stablecoin-friendly GENIUS Act in July.

item.title: Bitcoin turns risk on as stocks hit new highs and miner profits rise: Is $85K BTC next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s recent rally to $80,000 amid improving BTC miner and options markets metrics could create a clear path to $85,000.

item.title: Someone Built an Open-Source 'Theoretical Mythos' to Reverse-Engineer Anthropic's Most Dangerous AI
item.description: OpenMythos is a from-scratch attempt to reconstruct the architecture behind Claude Mythos, the cyber-capable model Anthropic refuses to release. It's speculation in code form.

item.title: Aave Fights to Unfreeze $71 Million as Kelp DAO Hack Spills Into Court
item.description: A federal case over frozen crypto could determine whether DeFi recovery funds can be seized to satisfy unrelated judgments.

item.title: K-Pop Firm's Stock Plunges as It Dumps Bitcoin Treasury Plan for AI Pivot
item.description: K Wave Media is shifting $485 million in funding from its Bitcoin treasury strategy towards an AI infrastructure play.
